channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from trusted sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Threatens Immediate Strikes if US Attacks as Ceasefire Extended
item.description: Iran's military stated its forces are 'ready and on the trigger' to strike pre-designated targets if the US launches any new attacks, as Trump extended the ceasefire deadline to allow time for Iran to submit a proposal.

item.title: ✈️ Lufthansa Cuts 20,000 Summer Flights to Reduce Fuel Costs Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Germany's Lufthansa Group announced it will trim its summer schedule by 20,000 flights to cut fuel costs, citing the ongoing Iran conflict's impact on aviation operations.

item.title: 🛡️ Pentagon Seeks Funds for Golden Dome, Drones and AI in Record $1.5T Budget
item.description: The Pentagon unveiled its largest-ever budget request, prioritizing the Golden Dome missile defense system, drones, and AI capabilities as key defense investments.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire as Pakistan Talks Remain Uncertain
item.description: Trump announced a ceasefire extension with Iran despite reports that dozens of vessels have evaded the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. The fate of Vance's Pakistan negotiations remains unclear.

item.title: 🇦🇫 US Offers Afghans in Qatar Choice Between Taliban-Ruled Afghanistan or DR Congo
item.description: The US is pressuring former Afghan allies stuck in Qatar to choose between returning to Taliban-controlled Afghanistan or resettling in the war-torn Democratic Republic of Congo.

item.title: 🛢️ Alternative Routes Emerge for Middle East Oil as Hormuz Disruption Persists
item.description: As the Strait of Hormuz remains disrupted, alternative oil and gas transport routes are being explored to maintain energy flows from the Middle East.

item.title: 💥 Iran War Causes Biggest Energy Crisis in History, IEA Warns
item.description: The International Energy Agency warns that the ongoing Iran conflict is creating the largest energy crisis in history, with significant global implications.

item.title: ⛽ Biofuels Back in Vogue as Iran War Triggers Oil Price Surge
item.description: Rising oil prices from the Iran conflict have renewed interest in biofuels as countries seek alternative energy sources.

item.title: 🛢️ Russia to Halt Kazakhstan's Oil Flows to Germany via Druzhba Pipeline
item.description: Russia plans to stop Kazakhstani oil shipments to Germany through the Druzhba pipeline, sources say, amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Prolonged Energy Disruption Would Widen India's Trade Deficit
item.description: Extended energy disruptions from the Iran conflict would significantly strain India's fiscal position and widen its trade deficit.

item.title: 🌍 BBC Live Coverage: US-Iran War Developments
item.description: Comprehensive live coverage of the ongoing US-Iran conflict and its global implications.

item.title: 🇲🇽 Mexico Investigates Crash That Killed CIA Officers in Chihuahua
item.description: A plane crash in Chihuahua, Mexico has killed multiple CIA officers, raising questions about the circumstances of the incident.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Opens Door to Global Arms Market with Biggest Export Rule Change in Decades
item.description: Japan has made its most significant defense export rule change in decades, opening the door to the global arms market amid regional security concerns.

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria Election Results Complicate Russia Relations
item.description: Bulgaria's recent election results are complicating the country's relationship with Russia as political coalitions shift.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Court Rules Hungary's LGBTQ Law Violates Human Rights
item.description: The European Court has ruled that Hungary's controversial LGBTQ legislation violates human rights, setting up a potential conflict with Budapest.

item.title: 🇮🇹 Italy Summons Russian Ambassador Over State TV Host's Insults to PM Meloni
item.description: Italy summoned Russia's ambassador to protest 'extremely serious and offensive' remarks made by a pro-Kremlin TV host about Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Considers Missile Sales to Ukraine Partners for Patriot Defense
item.description: Japan is considering selling missiles to Ukraine's partners for Patriot air defense systems, ships, and aviation as it expands its defense export capabilities.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Interior Minister Arrives in North Korea for Talks
item.description: Russia's interior minister has traveled to North Korea for discussions, highlighting the deepening ties between Moscow and Pyongyang.

item.title: 💶 Energy Shock 2.0: Who Breaks and Who Bends in Central and Eastern Europe
item.description: Analysis of how Central and Eastern European countries are responding to the second major energy shock in recent years.

item.title: 🇰🇵 Russian Interior Minister Arrives in North Korea for Talks
item.description: Russia's interior minister visited North Korea for high-level discussions amid strengthening bilateral relations.

item.title: 🔫 Mass Shooting Reignites Debate Over Gun Laws in War-Torn Ukraine
item.description: A mass shooting in Ukraine has sparked renewed debate about gun control in a country already dealing with the trauma of war.

item.title: 📊 Trump Approval Rating Slides Amid Iran War and Economic Concerns
item.description: Recent polling shows declining approval for President Trump as Americans weigh the costs of the Iran conflict and economic pressures.

item.title: 🌍 World Bank Climate Financing at Risk Amid Global Tensions
item.description: Efforts to keep World Bank climate financing alive face challenges as geopolitical tensions reshape global development priorities.

item.title: ⚔️ US-Iran War Live: Ceasefire Extended, Pakistan Peace Talks Continue
item.description: CBS News live coverage of the US-Iran conflict, including Trump's ceasefire extension and ongoing peace negotiations.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Opens Global Arms Market with Biggest Export Rule Change in Decades
item.description: Japan has made significant changes to its weapons export regulations, opening opportunities in the global defense market.
